title: autobench.shader v1
description: Per-case shader-benchmark result. Emitted after a GLSL/Slang fragment shader is compiled, rendered headless, and scored against a reference image via SSIM (and optionally LPIPS). Source: /autobench/shader.

verdict.description: Verdict — VF means visual fidelity is below the OK SSIM threshold but above the WA floor.

ssim.description: Structural similarity index of the rendered frame against the reference.

lpips.description: Optional LPIPS score; null if lpips package was unavailable.

render_time_ms.description: Wall-clock render time (GL command submission to ctx.finish) in ms.

frame_path.description: Filesystem path to the rendered PNG.

reference_path.description: Filesystem path to the reference PNG used for scoring.

compile_log_excerpt.description: First ~2KB of glslangValidator stdout+stderr (empty on clean compile).

language.description: Shader language (slang reserved for future tiers).
